member.name: T:Diamond.Core.AutoMapperExtensions.HostBuilderExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for configuring AutoMapper in .NET host and service collection builders.
member.remarks: These extension methods simplify the integration of AutoMapper into applications using dependency injection. They allow for automatic registration of mapping profiles and configuration of AutoMapper services within the application's dependency injection container.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.AutoMapperExtensions.HostBuilderExtensions.UseAutoMapper(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostBuilder)
member.summary: Adds AutoMapper configuration and services to the application's dependency injection container using the specified host builder.
member.remarks: This method enables AutoMapper support for the application by registering required services during host building. Call this method before building the host to ensure AutoMapper is available throughout the application's lifetime.
member.param: The host builder to which AutoMapper services will be added. Cannot be null.
member.returns: The same instance of the host builder for chaining additional configuration.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.AutoMapperExtensions.HostBuilderExtensions.UseAutoMapper(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Adds and configures AutoMapper services using the default initialization and profiles for the application.
member.remarks: This method registers AutoMapper with the dependency injection container and adds all available AutoMapper profiles. It should be called during application startup before resolving AutoMapper services.
member.param: The service collection to which AutoMapper services will be added.
member.returns: The same service collection instance, enabling method chaining.

member.name: T:Diamond.Core.AutoMapperExtensions.NullProfile
member.summary: Represents a profile that performs no operations and contains no data.
member.remarks: Use this class as a placeholder or default implementation when a non-null profile is required but no actual behavior is needed. This can be useful in scenarios where a profile is optional or when implementing the Null Object pattern.

member.name: T:Diamond.Core.AutoMapperExtensions.ProfileTemplate
member.summary: Provides a base class for profile implementations that require logging functionality.
member.remarks: Inherit from this class to create custom profiles with integrated logging support. The logger can be used to record diagnostic or operational information relevant to the profile's behavior.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.AutoMapperExtensions.ProfileTemplate.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Diamond.Core.AutoMapperExtensions.ProfileTemplate})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the ProfileTemplate class with the specified logger.
member.param: The logger instance used to record diagnostic and operational messages for the ProfileTemplate.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.AutoMapperExtensions.ProfileTemplate.Logger
member.summary: Gets or sets the logger used to record diagnostic and operational messages for the profile template.
member.remarks: Assign a custom logger to integrate with application-wide logging infrastructure. By default, a no-op logger is used, and no log output is produced unless a different logger is provided.
